programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!

programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang have vanquished Dr. Blakk. But a new threat emerges from beyond the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A new member joins the Shane Gang! His name is Junjie, and he is a master of the mysterious slugslinging art of Slug Fu. But even with the power of five slingers, the Shane Gang find themselves in over their heads trying to protect the ancient Elemental Slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Long thought to be merely a legend, an Enigmo Slug has finally been spotted. The bidding is high for this rarest of all slugs, and so is the competition to be the first grab it! Eli and the gang actually beat Slugterra's most vicious slug hunter to the prize-only to find that the hunter is now hunting them!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli fires slugs right and left during a fast-paced slugout on mecha-back! "See you back home," Eli tells the slugs he has to leave behind as he races across a cavern during the fight. The battle won, the Shane Gang is on its way back home when Eli runs into a situation that he can't ignore. One thing leads to another and Eli ends up challenged to a duel. Only one problem, Eli's doesn't have Burpy or the rest of his best slugs! They're still on the way back home!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli has added some awesome new slugs to his arsenal: the Elementals. But the Elemental Slugs are ancient, extremely powerful, and temperamental, and Eli can't control them. Junjie, the newest member of the Shane Gang, has the solution: Eli must learn Slug Fu, the ancient form of slugslinging that Junjie mastered in the Eastern Caverns. Slug Fu is the art of guiding and controlling a slug in battle, a skill that only the greatest slugslingers can master.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends and even some old enemies-to help them take down the Emperor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A thief breaks into the Shane Gang HQ looking for the fabled "Shane Treasure" - a portion of which she believes belongs to her. The thief escapes with nothing, but Eli does manage to find a treasure chest. To unlock it, the thief and the gang will need to travel to a remote, dangerous cavern to find a special slug. The journey is fraught with peril, and when they finally open the box, what's inside is not at all what they were expecting...

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Woodventures

The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child's play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. "Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos: Susto
programme.desc: El padre Lázaro no puede con la presión: quiere hablar con el obispo. Ernesto le pide a Chacorta que le dé un susto. Finalmente, en la casa de Danilo, Victoria y Aurelio se conocen.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: En venganza por la paliza de Max, Lucas sigue a su madre hasta la tumba del Tigre. Allí le lanza una piedra a la cabeza, dejando a Francisca en estado grave. Lucho e Irene hacen el amor.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro tiene una foto de Lucho, se la muestra a su hija y ella dice que es el duende. Francisca tiene un mensaje del Tigre para Verónica, le pide que ataque a sus enemigos y los sorprenda.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Alondra y otras jovencitas están secuestradas en la mansión Extravaganza, donde Joel y Sofía llegan para rescatarlas antes de que sean vendidas como esclavas sexuales. Jennifer huye del manicomio.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Aunque Max le suplica que no lo haga, Eliza contrae matrimonio con Andrés con la ovación y los aplausos de toda la familia. Declaran a Sofía inocente y disfruta del amor junto a Joel.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: La historia de Eliza Romero y Sofía Villavicencio, dos inmigrantes que vienen de mundos opuestos. Una persigue un sueño y la otra huye de una pesadilla.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.sub-title: Los Marín se unen a Marcial
programme.desc: Después de aclarar todas sus dudas, la familia Marín se une a la venganza que planea Marcial en contra de la Diabla. El Gato pide transportar 80 kilos de droga en la ruta de Yésica.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: Nachito, obligado por la Diabla, acepta matar al coronel Herrera: si no lo hace, su mamá pagará las consecuencias. Marcial promete a los Santana que les cederá el dinero de Catalina la grande.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: El niño de Jorge y Paula hace fotomontajes y los monetiza en internet su padre, horrorizado, exige la custodia de su hija. Jonathan sufre de podofilia, lo que le trae problemas a su prometida.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: El tatuaje de mi abuela Síndrome de Noé
programme.desc: En el funeral de su abuela, Brian cobró para que le hicieran fotos a un tatuaje que ella tiene en el abdomen. Juliette recoge los animales que encuentra a su paso, pero su esposo no tolera la situación.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: XXX con un monstruo Sorpresa inesperada
programme.desc: Viviana es una actriz porno que se negó a tener sexo con otro actor porque a él le faltan las dos manos. Blanca exige la custodia total del hijo de Michelle, quien acaba de salir de la cárcel.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Carolina descubrió que la graban en la intimidad con la cámara del bebé. Paola quiere regresar a Venezuela con su hija, pero el padre cree que la niña debe ser revisada por médicos en EE. UU.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Mi papá es un condón Hombre en coma, mujer gozando
programme.desc: Clara está a cargo de su nieto y exige que el padre le pague la manutención retroactiva. Por otro lado, Yoel cayó en coma por tomarse unas pastillas para satisfacer sexualmente a su esposa.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Juan descubre cómo elevar su vitalidad sexual y se obsesiona con ello. Alejandro y su hermana reciben una herencia, pero él gasta la totalidad en un proyecto musical que puede ser el último.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Lupita hace predicciones acertadas sobre Fulano consultando su perfil de Facebook. El hermano de Jorge se ahoga tras emborracharse y Jorge culpa al dueño del bar.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Dercy contrata los servicios de una empresa que ofrece servicios eróticos, pero cuando su amiga es obligada a participar en un acto sexual sin su consentimiento, Dercy interpone una demanda contra la empresa por violación.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.title: El rescate de un osezno
programme.desc: Casey Anderson se enfrentó con la decisión de dejar que un osezno pardo huérfano muera en la naturaleza o salvarlo.

programme.title: Escuela para ballenas
programme.desc: Sigue a una familia de cachalotes en el corazón del Océano Índico. Daremos a conocer al depredador dentado más grande de la Tierra.

programme.title: Chungungo: la nutria más pequeña del mundo
programme.desc: Los chuchungos, eligen vivir en la parte salvaje de Chile, a lo largo de toda la costa indómita del sur del Océano Pacífico.

programme.title: Explosión de vida
programme.desc: Desde flores salvajes hasta grandes colonias de medusas en Monterrey e increíbles olas que brillan en la oscuridad, esto es California.

programme.title: El mundo submarino secreto
programme.desc: Embárcate en un viaje con el afamado fotógrafo submarino Peter Kragh, mientras explora la costa de California.

programme.title: Invasión de hormigas rojas
programme.desc: Sé testigo de como las hormigas rojas representan un gran peligro para la humanidad, lo que provoca pánico en quienes se cruzan en su camino

programme.title: Bahía de cocodrilos
programme.desc: El cocodrilo cubano es una especie en peligro de extinción a punto de desaparecer. Conoce a las personas que intentan salvarlo.

programme.title: Una noche en el acuario
programme.desc: ¿Te preguntaste qué sucede a puertas cerradas en los zoológicos y acuarios? Echa un vistazo a los sucesos que los visitantes no logran ver.

programme.title: Lobos y tanques
programme.desc: Casi un siglo después de desaparecer, el lobo alemán regresa a su ecosistema natural, veamos el motivo de su regreso y expansión.

programme.title: El Lince ibérico: salvando al felino en mayor peligro de extinción del mundo
programme.desc: El lince ibérico, estuvo al borde de la extinción total, pero un grupo de científicos y conservacionistas luchan por repoblar la especie.

programme.title: Perros y gatos la rivalidad más salvaje de América
programme.desc: Tyler Johnerson explora la rivalidad entre los leones de montaña nativos y los lobos reintroducidos en el Parque Nacional de Yellowstone.

programme.title: Susurrador de tiburones
programme.desc: El experto en tiburones Jim Abernethy realiza impresionantes inmersiones sin jaulas para demostrar que no son monstruos devoradores.

programme.title: Enjambre de langostas
programme.desc: Enjambres devastadores de langostas devoran todo a su paso desde África hasta la India.

programme.title: Oceanos y Ríos
programme.desc: Riaan se une a Wanita, editora de Woman's Health, para bucear con focas en la bahía de Hout, nadando con los “perros del mar”.

programme.title: El Símbolo de Kalahari
programme.desc: Riaan y Yancke llevan a cabo un entrenamiento sobre seguridad de armas de fuego y practican tiro. ¿Podrán seguir las tradiciones de la caza?

programme.title: Bienvenidos al Paraíso
programme.desc: Riaan explora las montañas de Mahe en Seychelles y se reúne con el único seychelense que vive en la isla cuya pasión es la laguna de Alphonse.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Leopardos de las Nieves
programme.desc: A veces se le llama "el fantasma gris" o "el fantasma de las montañas". Su rareza y elusividad son legendarias.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Pumas
programme.desc: Los pumas también son llamados leones americanos o leones de montaña y solo están relacionados de manera lejana con los leones.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Leones
programme.desc: Los leones, únicos por su sociabilidad, forman manadas de hasta 35. En Masai Mara, Kenia, quedan <15,000, una caída del 75% en 50 años.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Leopardos
programme.desc: El leopardo, como la mayoría de grandes los felinos, es un maestro del sigilo. Es difícil verlo ya que necesita ser invisible para cazar.

programme.title: La Ultima Frontera
programme.desc: Jokke viaja a EE. UU. para divertirse en California y a Alaska para volar a gran velocidad con su amigo.¡Es hora del helicóptero!

programme.title: Blancos Horizontes
programme.desc: En primavera, Jokke y sus amigos abordan un helicóptero para hacer speed flying. Puede parecer pacífico, pero es muy peligroso.

programme.title: Los Gigantes del Este
programme.desc: Jokke, Niccolo y Espen viajan a China para participar en una competencia de vuelo con traje de alas.

programme.title: Regreso Seguro
programme.desc: El vuelo con traje de alas está entre los deportes más peligrosos del mundo. ¿Cómo logran Espen, Jokke y Niccolo mantenerse vivos?

programme.title: La Catástrofe del a Era de Bronce
programme.desc: ¿El repentino colapso de múltiples civilizaciones hace 3200 años se debió al cambio climático?

programme.desc: Cómo la ciencia sopesa la evidencia del impacto de las plagas catastróficas en el Imperio Romano.

programme.desc: Clara descubre que es adoptada, después de ser culpada por el accidente que sufre Paco, su primo, en la alberca. Con paciencia, Clara esperará a que su hermana Teresa y su primo Arturo reconozcan el error de sostener una relación entre ellos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El cobarde y el ladrón van siempre con precaución
programme.desc: Daniel es un joven de preparatoria que trata a sus profesores con la punta del pie, hasta que un día mata accidentalmente a la profesora Salazar junto con su amigo Sergio.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El hombre guapo ha de oler a vino y tabaco
programme.desc: El sueño de Fanny es ser modelo profesional y conoce a Torbaldo, un español con fachada de guapo y poderoso, pero que esconde un oscuro secreto Fanny cae en una trampa de trata de personas y es abusada sexualmente sin recordar nada.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Marisela sufre una severa inestabilidad psicológica debido a la violencia de su padre, eso la lleva a violentar, chantajear y cometer estupro con Leonardo.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De limpios y valentones están llenos los panteones
programme.desc: Un joven con mala conducta adquiere una pistola para vengarse del karateka que le quitó a su novia, pero su mamá buscará la manera de disciplinarlo.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven expone constantemente su integridad al cumplir retos por internet y esto lo lleva a descubrir que es adoptado. El joven decide buscar a su madre biológica y descubre una vida totalmente diferente en un pueblo lejano.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Galilea presenta a su hijo y los jueces seleccionan a los participantes de los 7 equipos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Comienza la competencia y se forman los equipos. Galilea presenta al niño que ha sido el primer lugar en la tabla de posiciones.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños cantan con estrellas invitadas. Tres equipos son sentenciados y Toñito revela su rostro.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños cantan a dúo con Yuri y Noel. Un escuadrón se despide de sus compañeros.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hay veces que las familias son separadas por situaciones fortuitas. Alejandro Muñoz es un periodista cuyo propósito en su programa de televisión es reunir a familias separadas por diversos motivos. Él cuenta algunas de sus experiencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La patrulla fronteriza de Estados Unidos tiene registro de que la mayoría de indocumentados que cruzan la frontera son centroamericanos. Dentro de esta población hay muchos menores de edad que viajan solos para reunirse con sus familiares.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En Nueva York existe una importante cantidad de población inmigrante proveniente de Casa Blanca, un pueblo del estado de Puebla en México. Ellos desean reunirse de nuevo con sus padres después de muchos años de no verlos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La inmigración a Estados Unidos se ha convertido en una industria con un enfoque monetario. En este episodio se dan a conocer las implicaciones monetarias además de los estragos emocionales que deja en los inmigrantes.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Salmo 100 es una organización que lleva mensajes de paz y reconciliación. Las historias de Daniel, Adrián o Giovanni son ejemplos de que usa Salmo 100 para ayudar a más personas que quieren salir del mundo del crimen organizado en la frontera.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Las redadas que realizan los agentes de migración han hecho que el miedo tome muchos vecindarios de Estados Unidos. Las historias de quienes han sido deportados son contadas. También, las historias de quienes viven temerosos de ser deportados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El temor a las deportaciones masivas aumentó después de que el Departamento de Seguridad Nacional anunciara nuevas reglas que priorizan las expulsiones de inmigrantes indocumentados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Familias trabajadoras están pensando dos veces antes de salir a su empleo o enviar a los niños a la escuela por temor de ser sorprendidos por las autoridades en la calle o usando el transporte público.

programme.title: Manu Dibango, Daniel Rallo, Jerry Malekani & Frederic Gaillardet
programme.sub-title: Soul Makossa: Manu Dibango in Stuttgart
programme.desc: Manu Dibango, one of Africa's biggest musical stars and top saxophonists, is an indispensable artist. He was one of the first African musicians to score a worldwide hit with his 1972 release “Soul Makossa”, paving the way for many other artists. The very concept of world music owes much to him. A superb stage performer with great communicative humour, Dibango is above all one of the founding fathers of a modern African musical style that is open to jazz, R&B, salsa, gospel, funk, and reggae. This concert showcases all these genres, and features an excellent line-up of musicians from the four corners of the planet.

programme.title: Junior Mance, Geoff Keezer, Bill Charlap & Alex Wilson
programme.desc: When renowned jazz pianists of the old and new school meet at a "Solo Piano Summit," audiences are treated to many an interesting musical surprise. The "Solo Piano Summit" brings together a handful of top pianists with different musical backgrounds: Jacky Terrasson, Junior Mance, Geoff Keezer, Bill Charlap and Alex Wilson. Besides solo performances the all-stars used the occasion for spontaneous interplay, improvisation and a fantastic finale - in short for the pleasure of virtuoso jazz piano playing.

programme.title: Charles Lloyd
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Keith Jarrett
programme.desc: Lugano Estival Jazz is an annual open-air music festival that takes place over five days at the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. On July 3, 1986, American pianist and composer Keith Jarrett is joined by bassist Gary Peacock and drummer Jack DeJohnette at Estival Jazz Lugano. Known as the Standards Trio, they put on an enthralling performance that shows these master musicians at their best.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.sub-title: Josh Evans - Ballad Of Ernie Washington
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Al Di Meola, Chris Carrington & Arto Tuncboyaciyan
programme.desc: 'Münchner Klaviersommer' was an annual concerts series that took place from 1981 to 1998 in Munich, Germany. Although the festival's name suggests a strong focus on piano music, it featured countless famous musicians from jazz and classical music – not just pianists. The concerts were usually held in July at The Gasteig, home of the Munich Philharmonic. In 1993, American guitarist Al Di Meola was one of the artists appearing here. With second guitarist Chris Carrington and percussionist Arto Tunçboyacıyan, Meola performs the now-classic world-fusion repertoire from his album 'World Sinfonia', which was originally released in 1991.

programme.title: Art Tatum
programme.desc: Embark on a remarkable journey through the world of jazz piano as we showcase some of the most iconic and influential pianists in history. This collection of extraordinary performances captures the unique essence and brilliance of legendary pianists Art Tatum, Thelonious Monk, Bud Powell, and others. Revel in Oscar Peterson's virtuosity as his trio plays “C-Jam Blues” in Holbaek, Denmark, on May 2, 1964. Let the sublime artistry of Art Tatum captivate you as he interprets Antonín Dvořák's “Humoresque” in 1953. Discover Thelonious Monk's enigmatic genius as his quartet performs his iconic composition “Round About Midnight” in Poland on April 4, 1966. Experience the timeless appeal of the Dave Brubeck Quartet's odd-metered “Take Five", recorded live in Brussels, Belgium, on October 10, 1964. Delight in the lyrical beauty of Bud Powell's solo performance of “Sweet and Lovely” at the Antibes Jazz Festival of July 13, 1960. Witness the fusion of jazz and funk in Herbie Hancock & The Headhunters' exhilarating studio performance of “Sly” in Bremen, Germany, recorded on November 6, 1974. Lastly, enjoy the soulful grooves of Horace Silver's “Song for my Father” performed by his quintet at the Umbria Jazz Festival of July 20, 1976. Tune in and let these legendary jazz pianists transport you on unforgettable musical adventures!

programme.title: B.B.King
programme.sub-title: B.B. King Orchestra - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1979, legendary American blues guitarist B.B. King gave an unforgettable performance for the audience in The Hague. Born in 1925 in a small town in Mississippi, 'Lucille' (as he nicknamed his guitar) helped him escape a miserable existence picking cotton. He arrived in Memphis in the late 1940s, where his cousin Bukka White taught him the tricks of the blues. Soon he developed his own style. King's virtuoso, narrative solos with lots of vibrato, have been an inspiration for most (rock) guitarists after him.

programme.title: Raphael Pichon, Ensemble Pygmalion, Sabine Devieilhe & Arnaud de Pasquale
programme.sub-title: Mozart - A Gala for the Weber Sisters
programme.desc: On March 23, 1783, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart gave a successful concert at Vienna's Burgtheater that he dedicated to two sopranos: Aloysia and Josepha Weber, the sisters of his wife Constanze. The concert's program would be considered odd by today's standards. The composer's Symphony No. 35 was broken up and interspersed with other compositions, such as concertos, arias, and works for solo piano. Nearly two and a half centuries later, French soprano Sabine Devieilhe, conductor Raphaël Pichon and his Ensemble Pygmalion bring a wonderful concert inspired by that remarkable event. The program includes: ‘Allegro con spirito' of Symphony No. 35, also known as the Haffner Symphony ‘Vorrei spiegarvi, oh Dio', KV 418 ‘Schon lacht der holde Frühling', KV 580 Trio of ‘Die Schlittenfahrt' No. 3, KV 605 Deutscher Tanz No. 6, KV 571 ‘Der Hölle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen' from Mozart's opera Die Zauberflöte ‘Finale: Presto' of Symphony No. 35 ‘Nehmt meinen Dank', KV 383 and ‘Dans un bois solitaire et sombre', KV 308. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Impérial de Compiègne, in Compiègne, France.

programme.title: amarcordplus & Sebastian Heindl
programme.sub-title: Baroque choral music by Bach, Schütz et al.
programme.desc: Five-strong vocal ensemble amarcord is joined by an extra alto and two soprano voices for this unusual concert at Leipzig's St. Thomas Church. As amarcordplus, the ensemble presents a program focused on the city of Leipzig, which includes sacred madrigals by Johann Hermann Schein, motets from Heinrich Schütz's collection Geistliche Chor-Music, as well as two motets by the most famous Thomaskantor: Johann Sebastian Bach. Moreover, various sacred works by lesser-known contemporaries Philipp Heinrich Erlebach and mononymous composer Liebhold are performed, in addition to compositions by other members of the Bach family, including Johann Michael Bach and Johann Christoph Bach. This performance was recorded on May 1, 2020.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Soloists of the Lucerne Festival Orchestra, Lucas Macías Navarro, Stefan Dohr & Jonathan Wegloop
programme.desc: The soloists from the Lucerne Festival Orchestra present two septets in this engaging 2020 concert, recorded at Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland. It opens with Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Divertimento No. 11 in D major, K. 251, known as the ‘Nannerl-Septet'. Mozart composed it in 1776, probably on the occasion of his sister Maria Anna's name day, whose nickname was ‘Nannerl'. The septet is scored for oboe, two horns, two violins, viola and double bass. The program continues with Ludwig van Beethoven's Septet in E-flat major, Op. 20, which is scored for clarinet, horn, bassoon, violin, viola, cello and double bass. This 1799 piece achieved great popularity during Beethoven's lifetime. It was arranged for many various instrumental ensembles, including versions for two guitars, and piano four-hands, but also a trio for clarinet (or violin), cello, and piano, arranged by Beethoven himself.

programme.title: Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Johannes Brahms' String Sextet No. 1 in B-flat major, Op. 18. The work is scored for two violins, two violas, and two cellos. Brahms wrote his only two string sextets at the very beginning of his career. String Sextet No. 1 was written in 1860. Brahms was one of the first to compose for this ensemble, blazing a trail for Antonín Dvořák, Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky, Arnold Schoenberg, and others. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2013.

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Philippe Herreweghe, Collegium Vocale Gent, Dorothee Mields & Thomas Hobbs
programme.desc: Philippe Herreweghe conducts his Collegium Vocale Gent in this chamber music program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. On the program are Bach's Orchestral Suite No. 4 in D major, BWV 1069 Gott der Herr ist Sonn und Schild, BWV 79 and Missa brevis in G major, BWV 236. The soloists are soprano Dorothee Mields, tenor Thomas Hobbs, countertenor Alex Potter, and bass Peter Kooij. The program continues with a fine selection of Bach's works performed by French lutenist Thomas Dunford. On the program are Suite for lute in G minor, BWV 995 Suite for solo cello in G major (arr. for lute), BWV 1007 and Chaconne from Partita for solo violin in D minor (arr. lute), BWV 1004. This concert was recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, in 2017.

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out three-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in late February 2008 when icons Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their all-too-brief days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969. Whether they will ever team again is unknown. But with Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood Live From Madison Square Garden fans everywhere are able to experience the sound and the glory of a performance on that famous stage by two of rock's greatest artists.

programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: Regarded as the ultimate stadium rock band, Queen dominated the charts across the world in the 70s and 80s. This documentary looks to the influences cast on the early days of the band and their formidable front man Freddie Mercury, how they continually pushed the musical envelope with each album throughout their career and left a legacy of outstanding songs and videos that shaped popular culture. Highlights from the episode: - Contributions come from leading figures in the music industry: Andrew Harrison (Q Magazine Editor), Kate Mossman (The Spectator), Hamish MacBain (NME), Kim Taylor Bennett (Time Out), Camilla Pia (BBC Radio 6), John Aizlewood (The Independent) and Michael Bonner (Uncut) - The people that inspired the early days of the band, music from Jimi Hendrix, Led Zeppelin and Little Richard. - Archive interview footage from Freddie in the 80s and a look at his solo output. - The story behind their show stealing performance at Live Aid and their collaboration with David Bowie. - The sadness behind the video of ‘ These Are The Days of Our Lives'. - An arena made soundtrack including the likes of ‘ Seven Seas of Rhye', ‘Killer Queen', ‘Bohemian Rhapsody', ‘We Will Rock You', ‘We Are The Champions', ‘Under Pressure', ‘I Want To Break Free' and ‘Radio Ga Ga'

programme.title: The Police
programme.desc: The Police were an English new wave band formed in London in 1977.[1] For most of their history the band consisted of Sting (lead vocals, bass guitar, primary songwriter), Andy Summers (guitar) and Stewart Copeland (drums, percussion). The Police became globally popular in the late 1970s and early 1980s and are generally regarded as one of the first new-wave groups to achieve mainstream success, playing a style of rock influenced by punk, reggae, and jazz. They are also considered one of the leaders of the Second British Invasion of the U.S. They disbanded in 1986, but reunited in early 2007 for a one-off world tour that ended in August 2008. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of The Police.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Morning Art Inspiration: Black & White Frames
programme.desc: Black & White E1 — An extraordinary art collection that embodies timeless beauty and sophistication. Each piece, crafted with a monochromatic palette, reveals the exquisite interplay of light and shadow. From captivating landscapes to evocative portraits, these black and white images evoke a sense of refined elegance, transporting viewers to a realm of tasteful minimalism.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Painters' Showcase S1E1 — Extraordinary paintings hand-selected by the Loupe team.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E1 — Dive into a mesmerizing symphony of color and form with this bold abstract art collection. Immerse yourself in a journey where shapes dance, colors converse, and the music paints a cinematic soundscape occupying the space between mirage and reality.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Shades Of Grey
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E12: Shades of Grey — Immerse yourself in an art collection where shades of gray evoke timeless sophistication. From monochrome cityscapes to contemporary grayscale interpretations, experience the art of understated beauty.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E7: Shades of Purple — Celebrating the richness and diversity of purple, with vibrant hues and bold compositions that evoke a sense of regal elegance and mystery.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades of Red (S1E3) — Explore a vibrant, passionate art collection where the color red takes center stage. The works showcase red's emotive power, from fiery abstract paintings to crimson-hued photographs, offering a visual journey through the spectrum of human emotions.

programme.title: Red, White, And Blue
programme.desc: Red, White, And Blue — A vibrant art collection featuring patriotic palettes, bold expressions, and dynamic compositions that celebrate the American spirit, culture, and creativity —honoring freedom, unity, and the diverse artistic voices.
